heading: Special disposition of perishable goods
label: 7324 Special disposition of perishable goods

children.heading: Application for examination
children.label: 1 Application for examination
children.text: The owner thereof, or the United States marshal of the district, may apply to the Secretary to examine it; and

children.heading: Appraisal
children.label: 2 Appraisal
children.text: If, in the opinion of the Secretary, it shall be necessary that such property should be sold to prevent such waste or expense, the Secretary shall appraise the same; and thereupon

children.heading: Return to owner under bond
children.label: 3 Return to owner under bond
children.text: The owner shall have such property returned to him upon giving bond in an amount equal to such appraised value to abide the final order, decree, or judgment of the court having cognizance of the case, and to pay the amount of said appraised value to the Secretary, the United States marshal, or otherwise, as may be ordered and directed by the court, which bond shall be filed by the Secretary with the United States attorney for the district in which the proceedings in rem authorized in section 7323 may be commenced.

children.heading: Order to sell
children.label: A Order to sell
children.text: If such owner shall neglect or refuse to give such bond, the Secretary shall issue to any Treasury officer or employee or to the United States marshal an order to sell the same.

children.heading: Manner of sale
children.label: B Manner of sale
children.text: Such Treasury officer or employee or the marshal shall as soon as practicable make public sale of such property in accordance with such regulations as may be prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Disposition of proceeds
children.label: C Disposition of proceeds
children.text: The proceeds of the sale, after deducting the reasonable costs of the seizure and sale, shall be paid to the court to abide its final order, decree, or judgment.

children.heading: Form of bond and sureties
children.label: 5 Form of bond and sureties
children.text: For provisions relating to form and sureties on bonds, see section 7101.
